content:
- Continued bug task .ralph/tasks/bugs/ralph-event-watch-missing-script-path.md from TO BE VERIFIED state.
- Performed deep skeptical verification with 16+ parallel probes of systemd state, unit templates, runtime journals, and repo scripts; changed plan to require %h-based paths and explicit deployed-unit sync verification, then switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented fix: added .ralph/event_watch.sh compatibility daemon, updated .ralph/systemd/ralph-event-watch.service ExecStart/WorkingDirectory to %h/work_mounts/patroni_rewrite/pgtuskmaster_rust, updated .ralph/ralph-status.sh with diagnostic missing ExecStart target check.
- Synced deployed user unit to ~/.config/systemd/user/ralph-event-watch.service, daemon-reloaded, restarted service, and confirmed active/running with no post-activation missing-script/status=127 errors (verified using journal --since ActiveEnterTimestamp).
- Captured evidence in .ralph/evidence/ralph-event-watch-missing-script-path-20260303T114111Z (before/after status, cat, journal, marker checks, gate logs).
- Ran all required gates with stabilizers and all passed: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint. Marker grep files for make test and make lint recorded NO_MATCH.
- Updated task file acceptance/status tags to done/true/<passing>true</passing>, ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh, and added AGENTS.md learning about %h systemd paths + since-active journal verification.
- Next immediate step is stage everything, commit with required message/evidence summary, push, and stop.

- Received PO mail asking for full test duration, per-test timings, and whether tests are parallel.
- Followed workflow as research/investigation only (no codebase fixes). Sent frequent email updates throughout: acknowledgment, plan, run starts, blocker updates, progress, and final summary.
- Read prior memory via .ralph/progress_read.sh.
- Inspected Makefile and confirmed full test command is `cargo test --all-targets`.
- First timing attempt failed because /usr/bin/time is absent; switched to bash built-in `time`.
- First per-test attempt on stable failed because `--report-time` requires nightly + unstable options.
- Installed nightly toolchain (`rustup toolchain install nightly`) to gather per-test durations.
- Ran timed nightly command with per-test report:
  `cargo +nightly test --all-targets -- -Z unstable-options --report-time`
  and captured `.ralph/evidence/full_test_timing_nightly.log`.
- Extracted per-test times into `.ralph/evidence/full_test_per_test_times.tsv` (sorted desc); 168 timed test lines captured; summed per-test seconds = 304.285.
- Ran timed stable default command:
  `cargo test --all-targets`
  and captured `.ralph/evidence/full_test_time_stable.log`.
- Stable full runtime measured: real 189.061s, user 22.432s, sys 14.692s.
- Nightly timing run wall time: real 219.580s; main 161-test suite finished in 152.05s.
- Determined parallelism is enabled: per-test sum (304.285s) >> main-suite wall clock (152.05s), with RUST_TEST_THREADS unset and nproc=4 (default libtest multithreading). Cargo binaries themselves still run sequentially.
- Sent final completion email to PO with measured totals, slowest tests, parallelism answer, and artifact file paths.
- Next step if asked: provide full 168-line per-test table inline or rerun under controlled thread counts (e.g., RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 vs default) for explicit speedup factor.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md and applied selection rules.
- No bug tasks had <passes>false</passes> or <passing>false</passing>; recurring meta-task exists but is lower priority than active <passes>false</passes> tasks.
- Selected highest-priority unblocked false task: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/34-task-add-non-test-unified-node-entrypoint-autobootstrap-and-ha-loop.md and wrote it to .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Next loop should execute task 34 implementation.

- Picked up current task from .ralph/current_task.txt: story-rust-system-harness/34-task-add-non-test-unified-node-entrypoint-autobootstrap-and-ha-loop.md.
- Ran broad parallel codebase reconnaissance across runtime/worker/config/process/ha/dcs/api/debug modules to understand current startup architecture and missing production entrypoint.
- Confirmed key gaps: no production node binary, no unified non-test runtime orchestrator, startup currently relies on manual pre-init in tests, and process model lacks basebackup primitive.
- Wrote a full Draft 1 implementation plan directly into task 34 with concrete phases, module-level edits, risk checklist, and required validation gates.
- Ended task file with lifecycle marker `TO BE VERIFIED` exactly per workflow.
- Next step (next turn): when task file is in TO BE VERIFIED state, perform deep skeptical verification pass, alter at least one plan element, and then promote marker to NOW EXECUTE only after that delta is documented.
